ofm.title: OnlyMonster is dominating AI OnlyFans management
ofm.summary: — became the go-to desktop browser/agency system purely through word-of-mouth beta growth, now outpacing all competitors. Integrates advanced AI assistance directly into the OnlyFans workflow. Source: https://onlymonster.ai/

ofm.title: Supercreator has been flagged as the leading AI OFM solution
ofm.summary: for 2026 — enables AI to fully operate OnlyFans accounts when agencies implement it correctly with transparency. Source: https://sozee.ai/resources/ai-powered-onlyfans-agency-software/

ofm.title: Fanvue AI now offers Voice AI
ofm.summary: — automatically replies to fans with voice notes that sound like the creator, plus Fanvue Analytics AI for advanced insights. Source: https://www.fanvue.com/pages/fanvue-ai

ofm.title: AI influencer market valued at $6-8 billion
ofm.summary: , forecasted to grow significantly through 2026. Digital talent agencies are building portfolios of AI models (persona → brand → content → funnel → email list). Source: https://www.imagine.art/blogs/how-ai-influencers-make-money

ofm.title: AI girlfriend app market hit $82M revenue in 2025
ofm.summary: , projected to reach $11B by 2032. Mental health/emotional wellness segment leads with 41% revenue share. Source: https://finance.yahoo.com/news/ai-girlfriend-app-market-reach-090200323.html

tools.title: Claude Code now supports Hooks
tools.summary: — deterministic automation for workflows (lifecycle events, tool handlers) rather than relying on LLM to choose actions. Perfect for enforcing project rules and repetitive task automation. Source: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks-guide

tools.title: OpenClaw 2026.3.2+ focuses on "trustworthy workflows"
tools.summary: — new secrets system, safer defaults, PDF tools, and ClawHub skill install/update flows moving it from demo to daily ops tool. Source: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases

tools.title: Agentic workflow architectures standardizing
tools.summary: — biggest shift in 2026 is standardized tool connectivity, with agents able to do more with less custom glue code. Safety/governance becoming core system components. Source: https://www.stackai.com/blog/the-2026-guide-to-agentic-workflow-architectures

tools.title: CrewAI remains the leading open-source multi-agent orchestration framework
tools.summary: — high-level abstractions + low-level APIs for building complex agent-driven workflows. Source: https://crewai.com/

tools.title: Agentic AI compressing weeks of coordination into continuous workflows
tools.summary: — engineering teams seeing automated coverage during validation and risk-surfacing during review. Source: https://www.cio.com/article/4134741/how-agentic-ai-will-reshape-engineering-workflows-in-2026.html

market.title: Puerto Escondido real estate accelerating
market.summary: — new boutique developments with contemporary architecture, infinity pools, ocean views attracting international buyers. La Punta transformation driving turnkey property demand. Source: https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/puerto-escondido-real-estate-market-trends-2026-investment-opportunities-on-oaxacas-pacific-coast/

market.title: PE rental market structurally resilient
market.summary: — tourism base diversified beyond surf season, digital nomad infrastructure growing (coworking, internet), wellness economy expanding. Additional Canadian/US air routes planned for 2026. Source: https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/puerto-escondido-real-estate-forecast-next-5-years

market.title: Tulum ATV rental competitors aggressive on pricing
market.summary: — seeing $55 USD minimum rentals (6hr). Lagoon Company needs to monitor competitive positioning vs. quality/differentiation. Source: https://www.tulum-tours.com/tulum-atv-rental.html

market.title: Rammed earth construction active in Mexico
market.summary: — Casa Ballena (Los Cabos) completed by RIMA Design Group using rammed earth arts center, Casa Nandi in Michoacan blending with natural environment. Growing recognition of low-maintenance, long-life walls. Source: https://archello.com/news/detail-rammed-earth-walls-of-casa-ballena-los-cabos

market.title: Infrastructure upgrades planned for Puerto Escondido
market.summary: — Santa María Colotepec municipality announced water system upgrades, road paving, drainage improvements for 2025-2026 in Brisas de Zicatela neighborhoods. Source: https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/los-tamarindos-puerto-escondido-up-and-coming-neighborhood-guide/
